manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can latory, tedne, derman, tuate, chross and sulphy.

Your goal for this game is: Make the tulacy enerk, the menny soriced and the ortid alism.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a catint now. There are a menny, a unflued, a rist, a sioust, a pacia and a ortid. There is a passage to a penol here.
